hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(py|html)$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "CLAUDE.md may need updating — if this change affects project structure, a new module, a design decision, or how the pipeline works, update CLAUDE.md now."}}'; fi
